i_001.name: Goblet of Caffeination
i_001.abilityText: If you unsuccessfully roll to use the equipped Hero card's effect, you may SACRIFICE this card, then roll to use that effect again immediately.

i_002.name: Ranger Mask
i_002.abilityText: The equipped Hero card is considered a Ranger instead of its original class.

i_003.name: Really Big Ring
i_003.abilityText: Each time you roll to use the equipped Hero card's effect, +2 to your roll.

i_004.name: Biggest Ring Ever
i_004.abilityText: Each time you roll to use the equipped Hero card's effect, you may DISCARD up to 3 cards. For each card discarded, +2 to your roll.

i_005.name: Fighter Mask
i_005.abilityText: The equipped Hero card is considered a Fighter instead of its original class.

i_006.name: Bard Mask
i_006.abilityText: The equipped Hero card is considered a Bard instead of its original class.

i_007.name: Thief Mask
i_007.abilityText: The equipped Hero card is considered a Thief instead of its original class.

i_008.name: Wizard Mask
i_008.abilityText: The equipped Hero card is considered a Wizard instead of its original class.

i_009.name: Necromancer Mask
i_009.abilityText: The equipped Hero card is considered a Necromancer instead of its original class.

i_010.name: Particularly Rusty Coin
i_010.abilityText: If you unsuccessfully roll to use the equipped Hero card's effect, DRAW a card.

i_011.name: Decoy Doll
i_011.abilityText: If the equipped Hero card would be sacrificed or destroyed, move this card to the discard pile instead.

i_012.name: Silver Lining
i_012.abilityText: If you unsuccessfully roll to use the equipped Hero card's effect, +2 to all of your rolls for the rest of your turn.

i_013.name: Berserker Mask
i_013.abilityText: The equipped Hero card is considered a Berserker instead of its original class.

i_014.name: Guardian Mask
i_014.abilityText: The equipped Hero card is considered a Guardian instead of its original class.
